name: Fundamental Theorem of Conjunctive Systems
description: Theorem and proof establishing that the conjunctive system constructor CSY defines a valid system parameterization.

elements.text: The conjunctive system Z belongs to DSYSTEMS, verifying the state, input, output, and transition/readout function conditions.
For every connectable vector of systems V, there exists Z ∈ DSYSTEMS such that (V, Z) ∈ CSY.
If (V1, Z1) ∈ CSY and (V2, Z2) ∈ CSY and V1 = V2, then Z1 = Z2.
